name: The Golf Club of Warsaw
about: The Golf Club of Warsaw is an indoor golf simulator venue that offers a premium experience for players of all abilities. Utilizing HD Golf simulator technology with four high-speed cameras, the facility provides accurate measurement of swing data and projection onto photo-realistic courses. The venue features semi-private rooms, a user-friendly interface with touch screens, and a variety of options including elite courses, social games, and practice modes. It is suitable for individual practice, friendly competitions, and corporate events, with a strong emphasis on high-tech simulation and comfort. Pricing appears to be on a per-session basis, accessible online booking, and availability for both casual players and serious golfers looking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Highly accurate HD Golf simulator technology with four high-speed cameras
Semi-private rooms for comfortable and focused play
Large catalog of world-class courses mapped in stunning HD graphics
Advanced swing analysis including spin, distance, and speed measurements

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Four high-speed camera system with dedicated spin camera accurate to +/-100RPM

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, though 'club_rentals' is listed as an amenity. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for confirmation.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any food or drink service, nor does it specify a BYOB policy. It is best to contact the venue directly for information outside catering policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an average duration for a full 18-hole simulation. Typically, indoor golf rounds can vary from 1.5 to 3 hours depending on the simulator setup and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website mentions 'Social Games' that are 'Perfect for challenging friends, family, or colleagues', but does not explicitly state specific child-friendly features or policies. It is advisable to contact the venue for details regarding children's participation and any age restrictions.
